'''Argavat''' was a planet within the [[Argavat system/Legends|Argavat system]], in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

A desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]], Argavat was the location of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base, from which the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] spy [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Waldron]] managed to steal the [[Imperial Battle Code]] and hide the code in the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[IP-8]]. Waldron sent a scrambled message to the Alliance. In response, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] rescued Waldron and the droid.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]'' {{1st}}
